# KhiproTeam

> KhiproTeam is an open-source software team building Bengali-language computing
> tools. Flagship projects: Khipro (compositional lowercase Bengali keyboard
> layout, Linux/Android/Windows) and Shörolipi (26-key unambiguous
> Banglish-to-Bengali transliteration).

KhiproTeam main site: https://khiproteam.com/

## Projects

### Khipro — Bengali compositional keyboard layout
- The first compositional lowercase keyboard layout for Bengali.
- Solves: repeated Shift use, mixed upper/lowercase mapping, hard-to-reach
  chandrabindu, missing nukta/dual danda.
- Approach: lowercase-input compositional layout (neither purely fixed nor
  purely phonetic — combination of both).
- Platforms: Linux, Android, Windows.
- Website: https://khipro.khiproteam.pro.bd/
- Source: https://github.com/khiproteam/khipro

### Shörolipi — Banglish-to-Bengali transliteration
- 26-key unambiguous (deterministic) Banglish-to-Bengali transliteration.
- Implementable on any standard QWERTY keyboard.
- Preserves correct Bengali pronunciation; phonetically exact output.
- Source: https://github.com/KhiproTeam/shorolipi
